summary: Completed testing of HevaPOS Iteration 20 infrastructure features. All 22 backend tests PASSED. Frontend UI verified - DB indexes created on startup, rate limiting active on auth/QR endpoints, printer check endpoint working, POS screen shows Printer Status indicator with Kitchen Printer name and amber dot, Table Management page loads with QR Codes button, QR Code dialog shows all tables with Download/Regen buttons and correct URLs, QR Guest Menu works end-to-end with order placement.
critical_code_review_comments: indexes.py: Creates MongoDB indexes on startup for orders, users, tables, products, categories, restaurants, printers, reservations
rate_limiter.py: SlowAPI limiter with in-memory storage for single-instance deployments
server.py: Sentry integration (optional via SENTRY_DSN env var), rate limiter exception handler, index creation on startup
qr_menu.py: Rate limited - public menu 30/min, order placement 10/min
printers.py: New /printer/check endpoint for TCP connectivity check, used by POS Printer Status indicator
POSScreen.js: Printer Status indicator checks /api/printer/check every 60s, shows green/amber/red dot based on status
TableManagement.js: QR Code generator dialog with qrcode.react, Download and Regen buttons for each table
TableManagement.js: Fixed todayReservations filter bug with optional chaining on reservation_time
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded data. QR orders created during testing with guest_name prefix 'TEST_'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 verified 6 infrastructure features: 1) DB indexes created on startup (check logs for '[DB] All indexes created/verified successfully'). 2) Rate limiting active - auth login 10/min, register 5/min, QR menu 30/min, QR order 10/min. 3) Sentry integration placeholder (set SENTRY_DSN env var to enable). 4) Printer check endpoint POST /api/printer/check returns {reachable: bool}. 5) POS Printer Status indicator shows Kitchen Printer name with green/amber/red dot. 6) QR Code generator in Table Management - dialog shows QR codes for all tables with Download/Regen buttons, URLs format: {base_url}/menu/{restaurant_id}/{hash}. 7) Offline mode with UUID-based orders and IndexedDB fallback (not tested in browser automation). Previous features (QR guest menu, WebSocket alerts, local receipt generation) still working.

frontend_tests.pos_screen_loads: PASSED - HevaPOS heading, 77 pending orders, 11 products
frontend_tests.printer_status_indicator: PASSED - Shows 'Kitchen Printer' with amber dot (checking status)
frontend_tests.pos_order_placement: PASSED - Added Margherita + Coca-Cola, total £12.49, Place Order works
frontend_tests.table_management_loads: PASSED - 4 tables, stats cards, QR Codes button visible
frontend_tests.qr_codes_dialog: PASSED - Shows 4 QR code cards with Download/Regen buttons
frontend_tests.qr_guest_menu_loads: PASSED - Pizza Palace Updated, Table 1, categories, products with GBP prices
frontend_tests.qr_add_to_cart: PASSED - Floating cart bar shows '1 item · £9.99'
frontend_tests.qr_cart_sheet: PASSED - Shows items, quantity controls, guest name input, total
frontend_tests.qr_place_order: PASSED - Order confirmation screen with 3D cloche image, Order #002

db_indexes.verification: Backend logs show '[DB] All indexes created/verified successfully'

rate_limiting.verification: Backend tests passed, endpoints respond normally within limits

sentry_integration.verification: Code review confirmed Sentry SDK initialization in server.py

printer_status_indicator.description: POS screen shows Printer Status indicator with Kitchen Printer name and colored dot
printer_status_indicator.verification: Screenshot shows 'Kitchen Printer' with amber dot in POS top bar

qr_code_generator.description: QR Code generator in Table Management page
qr_code_generator.verification: Screenshot shows QR dialog with 4 tables, Download/Regen buttons, correct URLs

qr_guest_menu_regression.verification: Full flow tested - menu loads, add to cart, place order, confirmation shown

pos_order_placement.verification: Added products to cart, clicked Place Order, pending orders count increased
